amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 43 — paragraph 1 — point b
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 43 — paragraph 1 — point b

## Text proposed by the Commission

(b) the conformity assessment procedure based on assessment of the quality management system and assessment of the technical documentation, with the involvement of a notified body, referred to in Annex VII.

(b)

(b)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(b) the conformity assessment procedure based on assessment of the quality management system and of the technical documentation, with the involvement of a notified body, referred to in Annex VII;

the conformity assessment procedure based on assessment of the quality management system and assessment of the technical documentation, with the involvement of a notified body, referred to in Annex VII.

the conformity assessment procedure based on assessment of the quality management system and of the technical documentation, with the involvement of a notified body, referred to in Annex VII;
commission_text:
